title: The Crimson Throne
objective: Defeat the Crimson Fang Commander and reclaim the city

dialogue.speaker: COMMANDER
dialogue.text: You dare enter my throne room? The Crimson Fang rules this city. You are nothing.

dialogue.speaker: JIN
dialogue.text: The Fang's reign ends tonight. For everyone you've hurt.

dialogue.speaker: COMMANDER
dialogue.text: ENOUGH! The shadows themselves will consume you!

dialogue.speaker: JIN
dialogue.text: The Commander falls. The city is free. The Crimson Fang is broken.
